name: cyber-security-pulse
title: Cyber Security Pulse
description: Latest important cyber security news, ranked by severity.
author: goran_breivik

commands.name: latest-news
commands.title: Cyber Security Pulse
commands.subtitle: Security news at a glance
commands.description: Lists the latest important cyber security news, ranked by severity.

preferences.name: feeds
preferences.title: Feed Sources
preferences.description: RSS sources to read. Comma-separated; each is Name|url or a bare url. Edit to add/remove. Empty restores the default set.
preferences.default: BleepingComputer|https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/feed/, The Hacker News|https://feeds.feedburner.com/TheHackersNews, Krebs on Security|https://krebsonsecurity.com/feed/, CISA Alerts|https://www.cisa.gov/cybersecurity-advisories/all.xml, Schneier on Security|https://www.schneier.com/feed/atom/, SANS ISC|https://isc.sans.edu/rssfeed_full.xml

preferences.name: watchlist
preferences.title: Priority Watchlist
preferences.description: Tech to pin in a ⭐ Watched section. Comma-separated; use | for aliases and pkg: for PURLs. e.g. Linux|kernel, Microsoft|windows, pkg:npm/express, OpenSSL

preferences.name: extraCritical
preferences.title: Extra Critical Keywords
preferences.description: Comma-separated keywords that also mark an item 🔴 Critical (matched in title or body). Added to the built-in signals.

preferences.name: extraHigh
preferences.title: Extra High Keywords
preferences.description: Comma-separated keywords that also mark an item 🟠 High. Added to the built-in signals.

preferences.name: extraMedium
preferences.title: Extra Medium Keywords
preferences.description: Comma-separated keywords that also mark an item 🟡 Medium. Added to the built-in signals.

preferences.name: denylist
preferences.title: Denylist
preferences.description: Comma-separated keywords to hide. Any item matching one (in title or summary) is removed from the list. e.g. Android, crypto
